## XBus.emit() method

Emits an event with a non-void payload.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
emit<Event extends XEvent>(event: Event, payload: XEventPayload<Event>, metadata?: WireMetadata): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | Event | The event name. |
|  payload | [XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt; | The payload of the event. |
|  metadata | [WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md) | The [metadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md) of the event. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
